# Event Management

Add support for creating and managing events, including event details, judges, prize money, and group registration. Allow teachers/admins to create events, set schedules, and manage participant groups.

## Features
- Create/edit/delete events
- Specify event details (name, description, schedule, judge, prize money)
- Register groups and participants
- Link events to committees

## Context
This will enable more structured and engaging extracurricular activities, and allow for competitions and group participation.
